TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kinilukuljan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 52 buwan, 205 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kinilukuljan ga Sapulju ru Vukide. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kinilukuljan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kinilukuljan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kinilukuljan ɣa s~ɕapulju ru *uki*e. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kinilukuljan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 52 buwan, 205 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kinilukuljan ga Sapulju ru Vukide. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kinilukuljan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kinilukuljan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kinilukuljan ɣa s~ɕapulju ru *uki*e. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kinilukuljan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
